text: Hello? Hello? Hey, good evening. My name is Alyssa. I'm calling because their appending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Tennessee State Relief Program. So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet? No. Oh, that's all right. That's exactly why I'm calling. I want to help you get these benefits processed before they go unclaimed. You're covered under both part A and part B, yes? Yes. Perfect. You qualify for the benefits. I'm forwarding you to our supervisor. Please hold on. Forget it. (beep)
